channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump rejects possibility of concessions to Iran

item.title: Hezbollah claims drone and rocket attacks on Israeli army positions
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Maariv: Hezbollah drone attacks raise concerns in Israeli army
- Israeli military reports striking 30 Hezbollah targets in southern Lebanon over past day]]>
